name_cn:
Genuine Grade Replica Fendi
💗Latest Old Flower Roll Mini Basket, dark brown calfskin with Old Flower lettered band, vintage yet stylish, comes with detachable calfskin long shoulder strap, can be crossbody or hand-held, great capacity, cute, playful and practical!
328
